overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a gas-lit historic city at night. The character traverses a park with Spanish moss-draped trees, ascends stone stairs, and walks along wet cobblestone streets past Victorian mansions, eventually passing a horse-drawn carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: park garden with stone stairs and flowering bushes

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs in the park

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs surrounded by flowering bushes and gas lamps

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading upward through the park
lush bushes with pink flowers lining the path
decorative black iron fence marking park boundary
cast iron lamp post with warm yellow glow
large oak tree draped with hanging Spanish moss

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a park garden at night, approaching and ascending a wide stone staircase. Pink flowering bushes line the gravel path while gas lamps cast a warm glow. Spanish moss hangs from large oak trees overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined park path approaching exit gate

agents.ego_description: walking along gravel path toward the park exit, passing benches and trees

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden park bench facing away from path

entered.detail: wooden slatted bench with man sitting
wrought iron gate marking exit from park to street
large two-story wooden house with lit windows and porch

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the park along a gravel path shaded by live oaks with Spanish moss. A man sits on a wooden bench to the left. The path leads toward an iron gate exit, with a Victorian mansion visible beyond the fence on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street with historic row houses and gas lamps

events.description: exits park through gate onto cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking along wet cobblestone street past historic homes and iron fences

entered.detail: wooden two-story house with balcony and shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: The character steps from the park onto a wet cobblestone street lined with historic row houses. Gas lamps illuminate the foggy night air. The wrought iron fence continues along the left sidewalk while wooden mansions with lit windows line the right side.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down cobblestone street, passing a horse-drawn carriage on the left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street, passing from left to right

entered.detail: wooden carriage with two horses and driver
tree with pink spring blossoms on the street corner
large historic building at the intersection with multiple stories

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street intersection where a horse-drawn carriage moves along the left side. A distinctive tree with pink blossoms stands at the corner, and a large historic building dominates the far side of the intersection. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm gaslight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded, organic atmosphere of a moonlit park into the structured, gas-lit elegance of a historic city street. It begins with the character ascending a wide stone staircase lined with pink flowering bushes and Spanish moss-draped oaks under the warm glow of gas lamps. As the character continues along a gravel path past a man resting on a wooden bench, the scene opens toward an iron gate and the silhouette of a Victorian mansion. The camera then transitions from the park onto wet cobblestones, where the air grows foggy and the surroundings shift to a row of historic houses with illuminated windows. Finally, the movement leads toward a street intersection where a horse-drawn carriage passes by a blossoming tree, with the wet ground reflecting the golden light of the city.
